summary: Reviewed WAVE05-SEC-005 shared worktree and docs. Active security note now records WAVE05 hardened runtime/bootstrap JWT/CORS/proxy/HSTS posture, shared client-identity extraction, JSON runtime failures, injected security service usage, and mustChangePassword enforcement. Remaining non-test http.Error scan is concentrated in handlers/markets, with resolvemarket.go explicitly identified as the next raw-auth/direct-JWT seam. FUTURE/01-long-term-security-hardening.md remains future/deferred and still holds MFA/RBAC/distributed rate limiting/request signing/session/compliance topics outside the active queue.
checks: git status --short; rg non-test http.Error under handlers/internal/security/server; rg security deferral terms across active/FUTURE notes and API docs
